steps.title: Use the axis of symmetry
steps.content: The maximum height occurs at $t=4$, so the parabola's axis of symmetry is $t=4$.

steps.title: Reflect the launch time
steps.content: The object has height $9$ at $t=0$. The matching time with the same height is the same distance on the other side of $t=4$: $$4+(4-0)=8.$$ That matches Choice B — $8$.
